sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الِابْتِسَامَةُ أَسْهَلُ طَرِيقَةٍ لِنَشْرِ السَّعَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, osmijeh je najlakši način da se širi sreća.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, a smile is the easiest way to spread happiness.

sentences.translation: Kada se nekome nasmiješiš, on se osjeća ugodnije.
sentences.translationEn: When you smile at someone they feel at ease.

sentences.arabic: الِابْتِسَامَةُ لَا تَكُلِّفُ شَيْئًا لَكِنَّهَا تُعْطِي كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Osmijeh ne košta ništa ali daje mnogo.
sentences.translationEn: A smile costs nothing but gives a lot.

sentences.arabic: أَحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَبْتَسِمَ لِكُلِّ شَخْصٍ أَلْتَقِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se nasmiješiti svakoj osobi s kojom se srećem.
sentences.translationEn: I try to smile at every person I meet.
